TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Richard_Alexander_(actor), title = Richard_Alexander_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Richard_Alexander_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Richard Alexander kawas tay 1902, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Richard Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Richard Alexander kawas tay 1902, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Richard Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: riʦ~ʨħar* alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, riʦ~ʨħar* alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
